title: lupinus sellulus var. medius
intro: Lupinus sellulus var. medius, also known as the bush lupine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly containing isoflavones, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lupinus sellulus var. medius include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and alleviate menopausal symptoms. Lupinus sellulus var. medius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
